data.title: The Bear Market Isn't Coming: 3 Reasons Why We're Not Heading There
data.description: Renowned financial influencer, Gav Blaxberg, says "The bear market isn't coming and most of 2025 will be a year of green candles."

data.title: DOGE Cuts To FTC Sow Confusion In Case Against Amazon
data.description: FTC attorney tells U.S. District Judge that the agency is facing a "dire resource situation." He then walked back the comments.

data.title: Goldman Sachs Trims FedEx Forecast, Cites B2B Weakness, Tariffs And Industrial Slowdown
data.description: Goldman Sachs lowered estimates for FedEx ahead of its Q3 earnings release, citing transportation challenges and volume declines. Analyst remains optimistic about cost-cutting efforts.

data.title: 12 Consumer Discretionary Stocks Moving In Thursday's Intraday Session
3 ETFs With Super Micro Computers Exposure, Enjoy AI Surge
data.description: Super Micro (NASDAQ: SMCI) is a top player in AI infrastructure with growing demand and potential for investors. ETFs like SMH, BOTZ and IGV can benefit from its growth.
